## The DNA publishing guide

*[Publishing DNA-derived data through biodiversity data platforms](https://doi.org/10.35035/DOC-VF1A-NR22)*


:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="75%"}
![](assets/dna_publishing_guide.png){fig-align="right" width="60%"}
:::

::: {.column width="25%"}
![](https://api.qrserver.com/v1/create-qr-code/?size=200x200&data=https://doi.org/10.35035/DOC-VF1A-NR22){fig-align="center" width="180px"}

:::

::::
